strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from backend services to UI and DevOps infrastructure
Strong open-source contributions and teaching background indicating communication and architectural thinking
concerns: Current title is 'Staff Software Engineer' with 8+ years of experience, far exceeding junior/mid-level expectations
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience, key required technologies for the role
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise and architectural maturity but significantly exceeds the seniority level of the role, lacks key required stack components like PostgreSQL and Nest.js, and has limited German proficiency despite the on-site requirement, making fit uncertain despite strong technical pedigree.
